questions.question: With @click.prevent.self, when does preventDefault() run compared to the self check?
options: Only after confirming the click was on the element itself
Before the self check, so it runs on ALL clicks including children
They run simultaneously in the same microtask
In the capture phase before any check

questions.question: When does modifier ORDER matter in Vue event directives?
options: Always — every modifier combination is order-sensitive
When one modifier is conditional (.self) and another has side effects
Only when chaining more than three modifiers together

questions.question: With @click.self.prevent on a div containing an anchor tag, what happens when you click the anchor?
options: Default navigation is prevented on the anchor
The self check fails first, so preventDefault never runs on the anchor
Both the handler and default are prevented
The event propagates up to the parent
